deployment_goal: strict Host/RHB split for SDFormer at 128x128 with board-proven Conv subgraphs and Host fallback for unsupported transformer/window/depthwise glue
accepted_rhb_submodels: stem_rgb_relu_128: RGB Conv3x3+ReLU 3->18, board All same=True
stem_dep_relu_128: depth Conv3x3+ReLU 1->6, board All same=True
down_conv_l1_128: Downsample pre-PixelUnshuffle Conv3x3 24->12, board All same=True
up_conv_l4_16: Upsample pre-PixelShuffle Conv3x3 192->384, board All same=True
attn_qkv_only_l1_128: attention qkv Conv1x1 24->72, board All same=True
attn_project_l1_128: attention project_out Conv1x1 24->24, board All same=True
ffn_project_out_l1_128: FFN project_out Conv1x1 69->24, board All same=True
final_head_chunk16_padded8_128: exact final-head input-channel split chunk, board All same=True
host_ops: depthwise qkv_dwconv and FFN dwconv for strict no-retrain path
final-head partial output sum and clamp/ReLU
forbidden_patterns: direct full SDFormer graph on RHB
depthwise group Conv inside RHB without fresh board-pass proof
single 24->138 or padded144 FFN project_in RHB package
GELU or tensor-tensor gate multiply inside RHB without retraining/validation
softmax/window attention inside RHB without exact board validation
notes: The upstream SDFormer repository currently has no checkpoint under /root/demo/SDformer-for-Depth-Completion, so end-to-end prediction quality cannot be validated yet.
The original NYU config is 228x304. HW128 is a deployment-aligned variant; window sizes must divide each stage resolution if retraining at 128x128.

For strict pretrained SDFormer semantics, use Host fallback for depthwise/group/window/nonlinear glue. For latency-first deployment, train a hardware-aligned SDFormer variant replacing depthwise/GELU-heavy blocks with board-proven Conv/ReLU blocks.
